emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Jurys Inn Galway website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 66/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- 5 HTTP assets
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No local business schema
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Missing contact page
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 12 external JS files
 HIGH
--------------------
- No mobile menu optimization


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios
